# External Comparison Catalogs

Prepared files for cross-comparison with the FastSpecFit DR2 (Loa) VAC.
Generated by `code/prepare-external.py`; FITS files are not version-controlled
and are moved between laptop and NERSC as needed.

**The reference catalog is always the Loa FastSpecFit VAC** (`specprod=loa`),
regardless of which data release the external catalog was run on.

Files are named `{shortcat}-{specprod}-{survey}-{program}.fits` where
`{specprod}` identifies the external catalog's data release.

All output columns are standardized to **h=1, Chabrier IMF** before writing.

## Contents

- [Zou et al. (CIGALE) ‚Äî `zouhu`](#zou-et-al-cigale--zouhu)
- [Siudek et al. (CIGALE-AGN) ‚Äî `cigaleagn`](#siudek-et-al-cigale-agn--cigaleagn)
- [Salim et al. (GSWLC-X2) ‚Äî `gswlcx2`](#salim-et-al-gswlc-x2--gswlcx2)

---

## Zou et al. (CIGALE) ‚Äî `zouhu`

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Short name | `zouhu` |
| Method | CIGALE SED fitting (AGN contribution included) |
| Lead | Hu Zou |
| IMF | Chabrier |
| H0 | 70 km/s/Mpc (h = 0.7) |
| Specprods | `loa` (DR2), `iron` (DR1) |
| Loa source | `/dvs_ro/cfs/cdirs/desicollab/users/zouhu/vac/dr2/dr2_galaxy_sedfitting_v1.0.fits` |
| Iron source | `/dvs_ro/cfs/cdirs/desi/public/dr1/vac/dr1/stellar-mass-emline/v1.0/dr1_galaxy_stellarmass_lineinfo_v1.0.fits` |

**References:**
- Zou et al. (2024) ‚Äî https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.3847/1538-4357/ad1409
- Sui et al. (2026) ‚Äî https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.3847/1538-3881/ae63b5
- DR1 VAC documentation ‚Äî https://data.desi.lbl.gov/doc/releases/dr1/vac/stellar-mass-emline/

Two photometric variants exist: 5-band tractor + 10-band spectrophotometry
(`_CG_15`) and 5-band tractor only (`_CG_5`). Only `_CG_15` is included in
the prepared files.

**Output columns** (after unit conversion to h=1):

| Column | Units | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `LOGMSTAR_ZOUHU` | log10(M/M_sun) | Stellar mass at h=1 |
| `LOGMSTAR_ERR_ZOUHU` | dex | 1œÉ uncertainty |
| `SFR_ZOUHU` | M_sun/yr | Star-formation rate at h=1 (linear) |
| `SFR_ERR_ZOUHU` | M_sun/yr | 1œÉ uncertainty |
| `TAUV_ZOUHU` | ‚Äî | V-band optical depth (converted from AV) |
| `TAUV_ERR_ZOUHU` | ‚Äî | 1œÉ uncertainty |
| `APERCORR_ZOUHU` | ‚Äî | Aperture correction factor |

## Siudek et al. (CIGALE-AGN) ‚Äî `cigaleagn`

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Short name | `cigaleagn` |
| Method | CIGALE SED fitting (AGN contribution included) |
| Lead | Malgorzata Siudek |
| IMF | Chabrier |
| H0 | 70.4 km/s/Mpc (h = 0.704, WMAP7) |
| Specprods | `iron` (DR1 only) |
| Source | `/dvs_ro/cfs/cdirs/desi/public/dr1/vac/dr1/cigale/iron/v1.2/IronPhysProp_v1.2.fits` |

**References:**
- Siudek et al. (2025) ‚Äî https://www.aanda.org/articles/aa/full_html/2025/08/aa55463-25/aa55463-25.html
- DR1 VAC documentation ‚Äî https://data.desi.lbl.gov/doc/releases/dr1/vac/cigale/

**Output columns** (after unit conversion to h=1):

| Column | Units | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `LOGMSTAR_CIGALEAGN` | log10(M/M_sun) | Stellar mass at h=1 |
| `LOGMSTAR_ERR_CIGALEAGN` | dex | 1œÉ uncertainty |
| `SFR_CIGALEAGN` | M_sun/yr | SFR at h=1 (linear; converted from log) |
| `SFR_ERR_CIGALEAGN` | M_sun/yr | 1œÉ uncertainty |
| `FLAG_LOGMSTAR_CIGALEAGN` | ‚Äî | Mass PDF quality flag; good fits: 0.2 < flag < 5.0 |
| `FLAG_LOGSFR_CIGALEAGN` | ‚Äî | SFR PDF quality flag; good fits: 0.2 < flag < 5.0 |
| `AGNFRAC_CIGALEAGN` | ‚Äî | AGN fraction |

## Salim et al. (GSWLC-X2) ‚Äî `gswlcx2`

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Short name | `gswlcx2` |
| Method | CIGALE SED fitting of GALEX+SDSS+WISE photometry |
| Lead | Samir Salim |
| IMF | Chabrier |
| H0 | 70.4 km/s/Mpc (h = 0.704, WMAP7) |
| Specprods | N/A (SDSS-based; matched by sky position + redshift) |
| Source | `/dvs_ro/cfs/cdirs/desicollab/users/ioannis/fastspecfit/external/GSWLC-X2.dat` |

**References:**
- Salim et al. (2016) ‚Äî https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.3847/0067-0049/227/1/2
- Salim et al. (2018) ‚Äî https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.3847/1538-4357/aabf3c
- Catalog homepage ‚Äî https://salims.pages.iu.edu/gswlc/

No TARGETID or SURVEY/PROGRAM columns; the full catalog is read once and
matched to each reference catalog by sky position (< 1.5 arcsec) and
redshift (|Œîv| < 1000 km/s). Output files are named
`gswlcx2-{survey}-{program}.fits` (no specprod component).

**Output columns** (after unit conversion to h=1):

| Column | Units | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `LOGMSTAR_GSWLCX2` | log10(M/M_sun) | Stellar mass at h=1 |
| `LOGMSTAR_ERR_GSWLCX2` | dex | 1œÉ uncertainty |
| `SFR_GSWLCX2` | M_sun/yr | SFR at h=1 (linear; converted from log) |
| `SFR_ERR_GSWLCX2` | M_sun/yr | 1œÉ uncertainty |
| `TAUV_GSWLCX2` | ‚Äî | V-band optical depth (converted from AV) |
| `TAUV_ERR_GSWLCX2` | ‚Äî | 1œÉ uncertainty |
